nemko.regulatory_authority: National Authorities in each Member State
nemko.mandatory_requirements_telecom_radio_saf: RadioSafetyEMC(Self-declaration allowed if Effective Use of Spectrum HS is used/listed in OJ, otherwise, EU Type Exam Cert.)
nemko.language_requirements_application_manual: Local language requirements are required. For more information, please contact your local Nemko sales representative
nemko.local_representation_required_for_approv: Other requirements for EMC, safety and ROHS might apply.Please check the Nemko Direct key info for more information.
nemko.approval_validity: Other requirements for EMC, safety and ROHS might apply.Please check the Nemko Direct key info for more information.
nemko.factory_inspection: No (unless Full Quality Assurance method used)
nemko.other_requirements: Life of product(product must comply with Designated Standard listed in UK list during placement of unit on market)
